## Checklist

- [ ] `./gradlew assembleDebug` passes
- [ ] Tested on a real Android device
- [ ] Existing chat flow still works
- [ ] Model Library opens correctly
- [ ] Memory-related screens still work
- [ ] Release Notes / Update History checked
- [ ] No private information, API keys, passwords, or personal file paths are included

## Risk area

- [ ] ChatScreen
- [ ] Model runtime
- [ ] Memory system
- [ ] Benchmark / A/B Test Lab
- [ ] Settings / Backup
- [ ] Documentation / Guide
- [ ] Low risk / isolated change
